tasks.instruction: Uzupelnij tabelke, dobierajac okreslenia (A-L) odpowiadajace danej kategorii. Trzy okreslenia podano dodatkowo i nie pasuja one do zadnej kategorii.

options.text: Charlie and the Chocolate Factory, about a boy who wins a golden ticket
Harry Potter and the Philosopher's Stone, the first book about a young wizard
The BFG, about a friendly giant who collects dreams
The Tales of Beedle the Bard, a collection of wizard fairy tales
The Hobbit, about Bilbo Baggins and his journey to a dragon's mountain
Oliver Twist, about an orphan boy in Victorian London
The Lord of the Rings, a trilogy set in the world of Middle-earth
Matilda, about a clever girl with unusual powers
The Silmarillion, a book about the ancient history of Middle-earth
Fantastic Beasts and Where to Find Them, a guide to magical creatures
The Chronicles of Narnia, about children who enter a world through a wardrobe
Alice's Adventures in Wonderland, about a girl who follows a white rabbit
